items.caption:
If you know you know 🥹🐾 

Henry is simply the best role model , more of a father figure, who’s taken Hughie under his wing.

I didn’t think I could love Henry more , but I truly do 💫 
In fact I’ve seen a side to him that feels brand new 

Hen and Hugh , We love you 💙💙
items.transcript: Hey, is it time for bed? Are you ready to go to bed? Goodnight boys.

items.caption:
☀️ Happy heatwave everyone 😅 from your local egg dealer over here🥚 (watch till the end 😂) I hope you all have a wonderful weekend , all the best 😘 xx 
———
ad - this reel features my Hinch Home range with @homebargains and my Midsummer Memories cleaning collection with @joyofclean 🫶🏼🩷🧡💜
items.transcript: Hello everyone, how are we doing? Today's reel is you coming with me to get some jobs done around this house. Let's go. First things first, the balloons need to go. They're nearly a week old. They've done really well considering they were £2.50 from T-Move. It's actually become a bit of a tradition in our home for me to decorate this particular wall in our kitchen with balloons no matter what, whether it's birthdays, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Easter. And can we just discuss the weather? Because I am not a summer girl, hence why I'm lighting a candle in 30 degree heat. But let's get some laundry on, shall we? And nothing says heatwave more to me than washing, drying and putting it away all in the same day. Now, I don't know about anyone else, but once a month for about a week, I lack all motivation. I cannot be bothered to do anything. And then at the end of that week, I get what I call house ick because it's just gone down the pan. So today I'm healing from what I call house ick. So I'm hoping this reel might help anyone that needs it to get up, get going. And don't forget to put your music on. Anyway, onto the boys' shoe cupboards. Decided to take all the shoes out, wipe it out, put them back. It felt good. And then on my little hue, have a look. And yes, I keep my socks downstairs because I cannot be bothered to go back upstairs to get a pair of socks. And it always seems that I need a pair of socks. However, watching this back, I have too many socks. I don't need all of those socks. But anyway, who cares about the socks? Quick flash spray wipe done of the bench that the kids use as a stage. And then upstairs into Vinnie's room to put away the clothes that have been in these wash baskets for roughly 10 working days. And then when I opened the drawers, I thought, nah, it's all got to come out. And the truth is, I don't even know why we have wardrobes in this house because we just live out of a laundry basket. The amount of clothes in here that were too small for Vinnie, I'm talking a year out of date here, right, goes to show how often I put clothes away. So getting this job done today felt blooming amazing. And a quick clean with a baby wipe and we're done. And now into our bedroom because I have a new storage box for my shoes and I'm absolutely buzzing about it. I don't really own many shoes, not going to lie. I couldn't even fill up one box, but I love it. So that's another job ticked off the list. I'm on a roll. Anyway, I've made the bed. I've sprayed the bed. I've gone into Lenny's room. I've Febreze the pillows, the duvet, opened up the windows, let the fresh air in. And then I got my roller out because I don't know whose silly idea it was to get wall carpets. It was me, but they do my absolute head in. We then seal the deal with some Febreze because this stuff smells insane. And then outside we go because let's be real, the cleaning, it never ends. And onto the chickens, my little fluffy butts. Now, I absolutely love my chickens, but let me just tell you this. For anyone thinking of getting chickens, these chickens take up more time and more money than my three alpacas, two dogs and my three kids. But you are talking to the local town egg dealer. In fact, I have so many eggs now, I swear they're starting to come out of my own ****. And that's me over and out, guys. Thank you for watching. From me to you, it's time to rest. And all the blooming best.
